input.background: Determine whether the boldface numbers in the given scenarios represent a parameter or a statistic.
input.question: Cost of antihypertensive medication. Data from 10 online pharmacies reveal that the average cost of a 1-month supply of a particular medication is $31.20 with standard deviation $7.75. Data from 10 community pharmacies shows an average cost of $33.18 with standard deviation $7.88. Are these values parameters or statistics?

output.answer: All are statistics. (These statistics will be used to infer costs at online and community pharmacies, respectively.)
